As of now, every order can be paid at once. I have this problem now. Order (quick one) is usually associated with a room number, but sometimes there are more people in the room that want to pay only their order items. I need a way to choose what each person will pay and then give them option to pay. Only when all of the people will pay I will set order as paid. Ask any additional question so you can come up with proper solution. Let's try to keep it as simple as possible.
